title: pkg/specgen: Add support for Linux emulation on FreeBSD
body:
This is limited to images that don't depend on complex cgroup or capability setups but does cover enough functionality to be useful.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Allow running Linux images on FreeBSD using emulation.
```
